parameters.content:
## Setup checklist
1. Open **Config** below and set:
   - `firebaseBaseUrl` → your Firebase Realtime Database URL (already set to your project)
   - `firebaseAuth` → your DB secret / auth token (leave "" only if your write rules are public — not recommended)
   - `fromEmail` → your iCloud address, e.g. `yourname@icloud.com`
2. Recipients are already set to Kendrick.uhles@cawgcadets.org and Maverick.mcnealy@utwg.cap.gov — edit in **Config** if needed.
3. Create an SMTP credential named **iCloud SMTP** (Credentials → Add Credential → SMTP):
   - Host: `smtp.mail.me.com`
   - Port: `587`
   - SSL/TLS: STARTTLS (not SSL)
   - User: your full iCloud address
   - Password: an **app-specific password** from appleid.apple.com → Sign-In and Security → App-Specific Passwords (requires 2FA on your Apple ID)
4. Open the **Send Zone Change Email** node and attach the iCloud SMTP credential you just created.
5. Activate the workflow. It polls every 10 minutes.
6. Quiet hours: 21:00-05:00 (no alerts sent, but stored as pending). When quiet hours end, a status update email is sent if there was a pending alert.

parameters.subject: =Wendover Weather Alert: {{$json.previousZone}} -> {{$json.zone}}
parameters.html:
=

Wendover Weather Zone Change

{{$json.previousZone}} → {{$json.zone}}

  • Risk Value (Feels Like): {{$json.riskValue}}°F
  • Actual Temperature: {{$json.temperature}}°F
  • Heat Index: {{$json.heatIndex !== null && $json.heatIndex !== undefined ? $json.heatIndex + '°F' : 'n/a'}}
  • Wind Chill: {{$json.windChill !== null && $json.windChill !== undefined ? $json.windChill + '°F' : 'n/a'}}
  • Humidity: {{$json.humidity ?? 'n/a'}}%
  • Wind Speed: {{$json.wind}} mph
  • Condition: {{$json.condition}}
  • Updated: {{$json.updated}}

Wendover Weather Alert System, check OCEA APP to confirm before performing action.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ zone: $("Compare Zones").item.json.zone, previousZone: $("Compare Zones").item.json.previousZone, updated: $("Compare Zones").item.json.updated }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ temperature: $("Compare Zones").item.json.temperature, feelsLike: $("Compare Zones").item.json.feelsLike, heatIndex: $("Compare Zones").item.json.heatIndex, windChill: $("Compare Zones").item.json.windChill, humidity: $("Compare Zones").item.json.humidity, wind: $("Compare Zones").item.json.wind, condition: $("Compare Zones").item.json.condition, riskValue: $("Compare Zones").item.json.riskValue, zone: $("Compare Zones").item.json.zone, updated: $("Compare Zones").item.json.updated }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fromZone: $("Compare Zones").item.json.previousZone, toZone: $("Compare Zones").item.json.zone, riskValue: $("Compare Zones").item.json.riskValue, timestamp: $("Compare Zones").item.json.updated, emailSent: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ temperature: $('Compare Zones').item.json.temperature, feelsLike: $('Compare Zones').item.json.feelsLike, heatIndex: $('Compare Zones').item.json.heatIndex, windChill: $('Compare Zones').item.json.windChill, humidity: $('Compare Zones').item.json.humidity, wind: $('Compare Zones').item.json.wind, condition: $('Compare Zones').item.json.condition, riskValue: $('Compare Zones').item.json.riskValue, zone: $('Compare Zones').item.json.zone, updated: $('Compare Zones').item.json.updated }) }}

parameters.subject: =Wendover Weather Status Update: {{$json.zone}}
parameters.html:
=

Wendover Weather Status Update

Current Zone: {{$json.zone}}

  • Risk Value (Feels Like): {{$json.riskValue}}°F
  • Actual Temperature: {{$json.temperature}}°F
  • Heat Index: {{$json.heatIndex !== null && $json.heatIndex !== undefined ? $json.heatIndex + '°F' : 'n/a'}}
  • Wind Chill: {{$json.windChill !== null && $json.windChill !== undefined ? $json.windChill + '°F' : 'n/a'}}
  • Humidity: {{$json.humidity ?? 'n/a'}}%
  • Wind Speed: {{$json.wind}} mph
  • Condition: {{$json.condition}}
  • Updated: {{$json.updated}}

This update was sent because a zone change occurred during quiet hours (21:00-05:00).

Wendover Weather Alert System

parameters.content:
## Daily Forecast
Sends a forecast email at 5:00 AM daily with expected zone changes during alert hours (5:00 AM - 8:59 PM).

parameters.subject: =Wendover Weather Daily Forecast - {{ $now.toFormat("MMMM d, yyyy") }}
parameters.html:
=

Wendover Weather Daily Forecast

Expected Zone Changes for {{ $now.toFormat("MMMM d, yyyy") }}

{{ $json.zoneChanges.length > 0 ? "
    " + $json.zoneChanges.map(c => "
  • " + c.time + " - Entering " + c.zone + " zone (Feels Like: " + c.feelsLike + "°F, Temp: " + c.temperature + "°F)
    • ").join("") + "
" : "

No zone changes expected today.

" }}

This forecast is based on NOAA hourly predictions and may change.

Wendover Weather Alert System
